title: Mackay Coast: Bowen to St Lawrence
attribution: © Commonwealth of Australia, Bureau of Meteorology

history.synopsis: A ridge extends over the north Queensland waters, weakening slightly on Thursday.

periods.label: Tonight
periods.winds: Southeasterly 20 to 25 knots, reaching up to 30 knots offshore north of Hamilton Island during the afternoon and evening.
periods.seas: 1 to 1.5 metres, increasing to 2 metres offshore.
periods.swell: Easterly below 1 metre inshore, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres offshore.

periods.label: Wed 8 Jul
periods.seas: 1 to 1.5 metres, increasing to 1.5 to 2 metres offshore.
periods.swell: Easterly below 1 metre inshore, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres offshore.

periods.label: Fri 10 Jul
periods.seas: Around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres offshore north of Hamilton Island.
periods.swell: Easterly 1 to 1.5 metres offshore, decreasing to around 1 metre during the afternoon or evening.
